Name: Juggernaut
Description: Unstoppable forward pressure. Hit hard and refuse to die.

Name: Warden
Description: Guardian of the expedition. Armor and health above all.

Name: Stormblade
Description: Speed and thunder. A warrior who fights like weather.

Name: Shadowdancer
Description: Strike from angles that should not exist.

Name: Pathfinder
Description: Master of routes and extraction. Faster and richer runs.

Name: Venomist
Description: Patience and poison. Everything falls eventually.

Name: Pyromancer
Description: Raw destruction poured through burning hands.

Name: Stormcaller
Description: Call the crownless sky down onto the realm.

Name: Chronomancer
Description: Bend haste and cooldowns until time apologizes.
